title: fix: remove klein-large (9B) — Modal billing limit reached
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Streamlining the Klein models
gist.blurb: We're focusing our Flux Klein offerings on the lightning-fast 4B variant, saying goodbye to the 9B version to keep the hive running smoothly.
gist.summary: The image generation API has been updated to focus exclusively on the efficient Klein 4B model, deprecating the larger 9B variant.
gist.impact: Users will experience a more streamlined model selection, with the fast and capable Klein 4B remaining fully available for image generation.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a gardener, pruning a larger plant to allow a smaller, faster-growing sprout (representing the 4B model) to thrive.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully pruning a large glowing code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) pot to help a smaller, faster-growing sprout thrive. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
